title: App shell — routing, providers, layout
purpose: Assemble the features into a coherent application: routes for the list and detail views and the provider stack (query client, namespace, websocket) they all depend on, with the whole bundle passing the house quality gates.
task: Build the app shell: React Router routes for / (list) and /workflows/:id (detail), the provider stack (QueryClient, namespace, websocket), and the layout chrome (header with namespace selector and connection indicator). Bring the whole bundle to a clean Biome and tsc pass.

requirements.title: Routing and layout chrome
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL define routes for / (workflow list) and /workflows/:id (workflow detail) and a layout shell with a header carrying the namespace selector and the connection indicator.
acceptance: src/app/routes.tsx defines / → WorkflowList and /workflows/:id → WorkflowDetail using React Router v7.
src/app/App.tsx renders the layout shell (header + routed content); the header includes NamespaceSelector and ConnectionIndicator.
Navigating from a list row to a detail route and back works in a render test.
Configurable base path from AU-001 is respected by the router.

requirements.title: Provider stack
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL wire the provider stack — TanStack QueryClient, the namespace context, and the websocket connection — around the routed application.
acceptance: src/app/providers.tsx nests QueryClientProvider → NamespaceProvider → (websocket connection lifecycle) around the router.
The websocket connects on mount and closes on unmount, and the QueryClient is configured consistently with apps/web's defaults.
A render test asserts the app mounts with all providers present and the list route renders.

requirements.title: House quality gates clean
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL bring the whole dashboard bundle to a clean Biome check and a clean tsc --noEmit, with no lint-disable comments added to silence findings.
acceptance: bun run check (Biome lint + format) passes clean across the app.
tsc --noEmit passes clean across the app.
bun run build produces the static bundle.
No biome-ignore or ts-ignore/ts-expect-error comments were added to silence findings.

boundaries: SHALL NOT reimplement features — it composes WorkflowList, WorkflowDetail, NamespaceSelector, and ConnectionIndicator.
SHALL NOT define server endpoints, the WebSocket protocol, or asset hosting — that is cluster AW (the shell only respects the configurable base path).
verification: bun run build produces a static bundle.
bun test passes for the shell render tests; no lint-disable comments added.
